title: Ability to export data from project overview
excerpt: We can already export a project, but only in Excel format - this only exports the board info (and any comments/updates) - as a project manager, there is also the requirement for other project reporting.  Other project ma…

posts.author: Caroline24 (Caroline Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml: We can already export a project, but only in Excel format - this only exports the board info (and any comments/updates) - as a project manager, there is also the requirement for other project reporting. Other project management tools had the ability to export the whole project overview - this would pull in details from the portfolio columns and risk / issue view.
